name: kahweol
mechanism: Coffee's stimulant effects are driven primarily by caffeine, which acts as a nonselective adenosine receptor antagonist; chlorogenic acids and diterpenes contribute additional antioxidant and metabolic effects.
summary: Coffee's stimulant effects are driven primarily by caffeine, which acts as a nonselective adenosine receptor antagonist; chlorogenic acids and diterpenes contribute additional antioxidant and metabolic effects.
